Uses of Class
BusinessLayer.Component

Packages that use Component
Package
Description
BusinessLayer
 

  • Uses of Component in BusinessLayer

    Subclasses of Component in BusinessLayer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AND
    AND gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    class 
    LED
    Represents a Light Emitting Diode (LED) component in a circuit simulation.
    class 
    NAND
    NAND gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    class 
    NOR
    NOR gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    class 
    NOT
    NOT gate (Inverter) component used in the digital logic simulator.
    class 
    OR
    OR gate component used in the digital logic simulator.
    class 
    Switch
    Represents a digital switch component in a circuit.
    class 
    XOR
    Represents a 2-input XOR (Exclusive OR) logic gate component.
    Methods in BusinessLayer that return Component
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Component
    AND.cloneComponent()
    Creates and returns a deep copy of this AND component.
    abstract Component
    Component.cloneComponent()
    Creates a deep copy of this component.
    Component
    LED.cloneComponent()
    Creates a copy of this LED component.
    Component
    NAND.cloneComponent()
    Creates and returns a deep copy of this NAND component.
    Component
    NOR.cloneComponent()
    Creates and returns a deep copy of this NOR component.
    Component
    NOT.cloneComponent()
    Creates and returns a deep copy of this NOT component.
    Component
    OR.cloneComponent()
    Creates and returns a deep copy of this OR component.
    Component
    Switch.cloneComponent()
    Creates a clone of this switch, including its state and selection status.
    Component
    XOR.cloneComponent()
    Creates a copy of this XOR gate.
    Component
    Pin.getOwner()
    Gets the owner component of this pin.
    Methods in BusinessLayer that return types with arguments of type Component
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<Component>
    Circuit.getComponents()
    Returns the list of components in the circuit.
    Methods in BusinessLayer with parameters of type Component
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Canvas.addComponent(Component c)
    Adds a component to the canvas and circuit.
    void
    Circuit.addComponent(Component component)
    Adds a component to the circuit if it doesn't already exist.
    Pin
    Pin.clonePin(Component newOwner)
    Creates and returns a copy of this pin for a new owner component.
    void
    Circuit.propagateFrom(Component source)
    Propagates signals starting from a specific component.
    void
    Circuit.removeComponent(Component component)
    Removes a component from the circuit.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Circuit.setComponents(ArrayList<Component> components)
    Sets the list of components in the circuit.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Pin(int x, int y, Pin.PinType type, Component owner)
    Constructs a Pin at the given position, with type and owner component.
